identity.content:
# Identity

## Brand
[Your brand name, what it does, and its personality (e.g., bold, friendly, authoritative)]

## Target Audience
[Who are you creating content for? Demographics, interests, pain points]

## Voice & Tone
[Your brand voice traits and how tone varies by channel — social, blog, email, ads]

## Channels
[Your primary and secondary marketing channels]

instructions.content:
# Instructions

## Language
[What language and register (formal/informal) should AI use?]

## Content Style
[Writing preferences — length, structure, use of CTAs, active voice, jargon level]

## Formatting Rules
[How to structure content by type — blog posts, social, email subjects, etc.]

## Platform Guidelines
[Platform-specific rules — character limits, hashtag usage, posting format]

context.content:
# Context

## Active Campaigns
[Current campaigns with goals, target audience, channels, and end dates]

## Editorial Calendar
[Planned content for this week, next week, monthly themes]

## KPIs
[Key metrics you're tracking — engagement rate, open rate, conversions]

## Competitors
[Key competitors and how you differentiate]
